title: Module Capacity Options
summary: Each unit module has selectable nominal cooling capacities of 65kW, 80kW, and 130kW.
evidence_quote: 每个单元模块的名义制冷量不同，有65kW，80kW 和 130kW 可选。

title: Maximum Number of Modules
summary: The system can combine up to 8 unit modules.
evidence_quote: 通过组合 1～8 个相同或不同的单元模块

title: Total System Cooling Capacity Range
summary: The combined system cooling capacity ranges from 65kW to 1040kW.
evidence_quote: 机组形成制冷量在 65～1040kW 范围的系列产品。

title: Low Temperature Heating Operation Limit
summary: The unit can provide stable heating at ambient temperatures as low as -15°C.
evidence_quote: 使机组可以在低至-15℃温度下稳定制热。

title: Refrigerant Types
summary: The B series uses R22 refrigerant, and the N series uses R407C refrigerant.
evidence_quote: B-B系列机组、工质为 R22，N-新工质机组、工质为 R407 c

title: Power Supply Specification
summary: The power supply is 380V, 3-phase, 50Hz.

title: Water Side Heat Exchanger Maximum Pressure
summary: The maximum allowable pressure on the water side is 1 MPa.

title: Nominal Cooling Condition - Water Side
summary: For nominal cooling, the water flow rate is 0.172 m³/(h·kW) and the outlet water temperature is 7°C.

title: Nominal Cooling Condition - Air Side
summary: For nominal cooling, the outdoor air dry-bulb temperature is 35°C.

title: Nominal Heating Condition - Water Side
summary: For nominal heat pump heating, the outlet water temperature is 45°C.

title: Nominal Heating Condition - Air Side
summary: For nominal heat pump heating, the outdoor air dry-bulb temperature is 7°C and wet-bulb temperature is 6°C.

title: Cooling Operating Range - Water Side
summary: For cooling, the allowable outlet water temperature range is 5 to 15°C, and the allowable temperature difference is 2.5 to 8°C.

title: Cooling Operating Range - Air Side
summary: For cooling, the allowable outdoor air dry-bulb temperature range is 18 to 50°C.

title: Heating Operating Range - Water Side
summary: For heat pump heating, the allowable outlet water temperature range is 30 to 50°C, and the allowable temperature difference is 2.5 to 8°C.

title: Heating Operating Range - Air Side
summary: For heat pump heating, the allowable outdoor air dry-bulb temperature range is -10 to 24°C.

title: Anti-Snow Measures for Northern Regions
summary: In snowy regions, install the unit away from eaves, raise the foundation above average snow height, and install snow guards on air inlets and outlets.
evidence_quote: 防积雪措施:1）避免将机组安装于易积雪的屋檐下；2）根据机组安装地的积雪量来设计机组的基础，使基础高度大于年平均积雪高度；3）在机组的进出风口安装防雪罩。

title: Winter Pre-Heating Requirement
summary: Before starting the unit in winter or after a long shutdown, power must be supplied to the unit (without starting the water pump) for at least 8 hours.
evidence_quote: 在开机前应先给机组供电（此时水泵不要启动） ，且通电时间不得低于 8 小时；

title: Winter Freeze Protection for Water System
summary: To prevent freezing during winter shutdown, either keep the water pump running, completely drain the water, or add an ethanol and propanol mixture. Never use salt mixtures.

methods: Keep water pump running during shutdown

evidence_quote: 为防止冻结，在机组停机时水泵也要运行。最安全的方法是将水完全从管道内放掉，也可以在水里添加乙醇和丙醇混合物来防冻。注意：绝不可使用盐类混合物，以免腐蚀机组，损坏设备。

title: Anti-Freeze Requirement for Heat Pump in Low Ambient
summary: When operating a heat pump unit in ambient temperatures below 0°C, antifreeze must be added to the water system.
evidence_quote: 热泵机组在环境温度低于 0℃运行时，必须添加防冻液来防冻；

title: Minimum Clearance for Installation
summary: For installation, maintain a minimum clearance of 1000mm on the sides and 2000mm on the air inlet/outlet sides.

title: Foundation Bolt Specification
summary: The unit foundation requires 4-M12 anchor bolts.

title: Module Communication Wiring
summary: Modules are interconnected using a four-core control cable for X2/X3 connections and a two-core signal cable for terminals 34/35.
evidence_quote: 用四芯控制连接线将各模块之间的X2、X3连接起来，用1根二芯信号控制线(2 ×1mm2)将各模块之间的接线板上的34.35连接起来

title: Water Flow Switch Connection
summary: The water flow switch is connected to the main module's terminals 34 and 35 using a two-core cable.
evidence_quote: 用1根二芯软导线(2 ×1mm2)将水流开关引线接至主模块接线板上的34.35

title: Power Line Connection
summary: The main power line is connected to each module's TB1 terminals (L1, L2, L3, N) using a four-core cable.
evidence_quote: 用1根四芯橡套软电缆线(4 ×10~35mm 2)将动力线一线接至各模块接线板TB1的L1 .L2.L3.N

title: Water Pump Relay Connection
summary: The water pump relay switch is connected to the main module's TB4-12 and N terminals.
evidence_quote: 用1根二芯软导线(2 ×1mm2)将水泵继电器开关引线接至主模块接线板TB4-12，N

title: Auxiliary Heater Relay Connections
summary: Auxiliary heater 1 relay connects to TB4-(N,8) and heater 2 relay connects to TB4-(N,11).
evidence_quote: 用2根二芯软导线(2 ×1mm2)将辅助电加热器1，2继电器开关引线分别接至主模块接线板 TB4-(N.8),(N.11)

title: Vibration and Noise Reduction Installation
summary: Use rubber vibration dampers and rubber flexible joints to reduce noise and vibration.
evidence_quote: 应采用橡胶减振垫﹑橡胶软接头等，以减低机组的噪音，减弱振动；

title: Noise Pollution Avoidance
summary: Avoid installing the unit under windows or between buildings to prevent noise pollution; use sound insulation if necessary.

structured_payload.guidance: Avoid installation under windows or between buildings

evidence_quote: 机组安装位置应避免选在窗下和建筑物之间，以防噪声污染，必要时采用隔音措施。
